$ open stemmed-in --weekly

STEMmed In

Making complex ideas simple and powerful.

A weekly newsletter that breaks down how AI and machine learning are applied in medicine, finance, physics, biology, chemistry, and beyond.

Visit Newsletter →

Where We Focus

Each issue connects core ML ideas to practical use in real domains.

Physics

Simulation-aware ML, inverse problems, scientific computing, and uncertainty estimation for physical systems.

Medicine

Clinical AI baselines: diagnostic metrics, trial logic, risk models, imaging pipelines, and responsible deployment.

Finance

Forecasting, portfolio optimization, risk controls, and evaluation methods that avoid fragile backtest results.

Bio/Chem

Foundations for computational biology and chemistry: sequence data, structure representations, and noise-aware modeling.

© 2026 Kevin Zhou • "You don't have any enemies. No one has any."
